# CI 门禁报告模板 (CI Gate Report Template)

## 1. Report 模板

```markdown
## CI 质量门禁设计与配置审计报告 (CI Quality Gates Report)

## 基本标识信息 (Identity)

- 生成工具 (Generated By): /ci-quality-gates
- 生成时间 (Generated At): <ISO 8601>
- CI 提供商 (Provider): <github-actions | gitlab | circleci | azure | custom | none>
- 目标保护分支 (Target Branches): <branches>

## 既有 CI 资产排查 (Existing CI Inventory)
|  | 工作流/流水线名称 (Workflow / Pipeline) | 运行任务 (Job) | 触发条件 (Trigger) | 是否强控 (Required) | 事实依据 (Evidence) |  |
|  | --------------------- | ----- | --------- | ---------- | ---------- |  |
|  | <workflow> | <job> | pull_request / push | Yes / No | <path> |  |

## 提议启用的质量门禁 (Proposed Gates)
|  | 门禁类型 (Gate) | 是否强控 (Required) | 运行命令/任务 (Command / Job) | 产生交付物 (Artifact) | 失败时分流路由 (Route If Failed) |  |
|  | ------ | ---------- | --------------- | ---------- | ----------------- |  |
|  | 语法及风格检查 (lint) | Yes / No | <command/job> | `<artifact>` | /specs-execute |  |
|  | 类型检查 (typecheck) | Yes / No | <command/job> | `<artifact>` | /specs-execute |  |
|  | 单元与集成测试 (unit) | Yes / No | <command/job> | `<artifact>` | /specs-execute |  |
|  | 测试覆盖率 (coverage) | Yes / No | <command/job> | `<artifact>` | /code-health-dashboard |  |
|  | 安全隐私漏洞 (security) | Yes / No | <command/job> | `<artifact>` | /security-privacy-audit |  |

## 分支保护策略建议 (Branch Protection Recommendation)
|  | 保护配置项 (Setting) | 既有现状 (Current) | 提议方案 (Proposed) | 是否需要用户授权 (Requires Approval) |  |
|  | --------- | --------- | ---------- | ------------------- |  |
|  | 强控合并校验项 (required checks) | <current> | `<proposed>` | Yes / No |  |
|  | 强制代码审查 (require review) | <current> | `<proposed>` | Yes / No |  |
|  | 新提交失效旧审批 (dismiss stale approvals) | <current> | `<proposed>` | Yes / No |  |

## 运行故障分类与审计规则 (Failure Classification)
|  | 任务 (Job) | 数据分类 (Bucket) | 事实依据 (Evidence) | 跟踪路由 (Route) |  |
|  | ----- | -------- | ---------- | ------- |  |
|  | <job> | 真实业务失败 (actual_failure) / 随机不稳定 (flaky_failure) / 环境异常 (env_error) / 权限问题 (permission) / 坏配置 (misconfiguration) | <path> | <route> |  |

## 最终审计结论 (Verdict)

- CI 门禁就绪状态 (CI Gate): READY / BLOCKED / APPROVAL_REQUIRED
- 工作流状态标签 (State): /ci-quality-gates:<STATE>
- 待授权批准项 (Approval Required): <None or list>

```

## 2. 结论判定规则 (Verdict Rules)

| 规则 ID (Rule ID) | 条件 | 结论 (Verdict) |
| --------- | ------ | --------- |
| CGR-R1 | 必需门禁已映射且无需远端变更 (required gates mapped and no remote change needed) | READY |
| CGR-R2 | 建议了远端分支保护 / 仓库设置变更 (remote branch protection / repository setting change proposed) | APPROVAL_REQUIRED |
| CGR-R3 | 必需门禁缺失命令 / 产物 (required gate missing command / artifact) | BLOCKED |
| CGR-R4 | 密钥 / 运行器 / 未信任 PR 风险 (secrets / runner / untrusted PR risk) | BLOCKED + `/security-privacy-audit` |
| CGR-R5 | Flaky 隔离不完整 (flaky quarantine incomplete) | BLOCKED |

## 3. 审批边界 (Approval Boundary)

| 动作 (Action) | 是否需要审批 (Approval Required) |
| -------- | ------------------- |
| 仅起草报告 (Draft report only) | 否 (No) |
| 编辑本地 CI 配置 (Edit local CI config) | 是，若需要写入文件 (Yes if writing files) |
| 变更远端分支保护 (Change remote branch protection) | 是 (Yes) |
| 添加 / 轮换密钥 (Add / rotate secrets) | 是 (Yes) + `/security-privacy-audit` |
| 启用付费运行器 / 外部服务 (Enable paid runner / external service) | 是 (Yes) |

## 4. 禁止项

| 禁止项 | 原因 |
| -------- | ------ |
| 不把 proposed branch protection 当 applied | Draft 不是远端事实 |
| 不把 skipped gate 当 PASS | skipped 必须有 N/A 或 route |
| 不隐藏 flaky | flaky 是风险，必须 owner + expiry |
